2605.03412.title: Smart Passive Acoustic Monitoring: Embedding a Classifier on AudioMoth Microcontroller
2605.03412.paper_summary: Passive Acoustic Monitoring (PAM) is an efficient and non-invasive method for surveying ecosystems at a reduced cost. Typically, autonomous recorders allow the acquisition of vast bioacoustic datasets which are then analyzed. However, power consumption and data storage are both scarce and limit the duration of acquisition campaigns. To address this issue, we propose a smart PAM system which allows the in-situ analysis of the soundscape by embedding a classifier directly onto an AudioMoth microcontroller. Specifically, we propose an optimized yet simple 1D Convolutional Neural Network (1D-CNN) to classify the raw audio. The model focuses on the specific call of Scopoli Shearwater seabirds (endangered species) and is trained on a real-world dataset with a classification accuracy of 91\% (balanced accuracy of 89\%). We also propose a process to optimize the model to fit the severe resource constraints of the AudioMoth, achieving a \~10kB RAM memory footprint and 20ms inference time. Finally, we present an open-source tutorial of our model optimization and export strategy which can be used for embedding models beyond the scope of our study. Our modified version of the AudioMoth firmware adds two functions: (F1) which selectively records data when the target species has been detected and (F2) which logs the continuous classification results in real time. This work intends to facilitate the conception of intelligent sensors, enhancing the efficiency and scalability of bioacoustic monitoring campaigns.
2605.03412.paper_summary_zh: 被動聲學監測（PAM）是一種高效且非侵入性的方法，用於以降低成本調查生態系統。<lb/>通常，自主錄音設備允許獲取大量生物聲學數據集，然後進行分析。<lb/>然而，功耗和數據存儲都很有限，限制了獲取活動的持續時間。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了一種智能PAM系統，通過將分類器直接嵌入AudioMoth微控制器來實現聲景的現場分析。<lb/>具體而言，我們提出了一種優化但簡單的1D卷積神經網絡（1D-CNN）來對原始音頻進行分類。<lb/>該模型專注於斯科波利海燕（瀕危物種）的特定叫聲，並在一個現實世界數據集上進行訓練，分類準確率達到91\%（平衡準確率為89\%）。<lb/>我們還提出了一個過程，以優化模型以適應AudioMoth的嚴格資源限制，實現約10kB的RAM內存佔用和20毫秒的推理時間。<lb/>最後，我們展示了我們模型優化和導出策略的開源教程，這可以用於嵌入超出我們研究範疇的模型。<lb/>我們修改的AudioMoth固件增加了兩個功能：（F1）在檢測到目標物種時選擇性錄製數據，以及（F2）實時記錄連續分類結果。<lb/>這項工作旨在促進智能傳感器的概念，提升生物聲學監測活動的效率和可擴展性。
2605.03412.author: Louis Lerbourg et.al.
2605.03412.authors: Louis Lerbourg, Paul Peyret, Juliette Linossier, Marielle Malfante
